statuses.pass: The preregistered gate passed on the declared evidence.
statuses.fail: The preregistered gate failed on the declared evidence.
statuses.inconclusive: Evidence exists but cannot adjudicate the gate.
statuses.not_run: The registered run has not produced evidence yet.
statuses.superseded: A newer evidence record replaces this record; history remains immutable.
statuses.retired: The claim or run was intentionally retired before adjudication.

records.notes: The corrected positive-price Lagrangian and d=1 allocation pass executable regression checks.
Expected error reduction is now MAE_now - MAE_after; the heuristic is explicitly scoped.
The frozen design fails generator, group-specificity, and transport gates; the apparent win is coverage-localized.
Only 8 of 104 candidates meet the two-surface threshold versus 52 required; confirmatory execution is blocked.
The external-contact result does not support portable weakness-to-generalization causality.
Load-bearing and perturbation-resistance proxies are present, but basin geometry and return dynamics were not measured.
